title: Class 0 E002 emergency button triple-hit scenario
description: Deterministic scenario skeleton for a representative E002-aligned emergency path (bounded input triple-hit). This file is an integration asset and must remain aligned with frozen assets under common/. E002 may be reached directly from a triple-hit event or during Class 2 clarification if a triple-hit pattern occurs while the system is waiting for confirmation.

steps.description: Publish an E002 emergency-aligned bounded-input triple-hit payload through the registry-aligned emergency ingress plane or a controlled bridge that produces policy-router-compatible input.
Observe the verification-safe audit stream and capture the emergency routing outcome.

class2_transition_reference.required_condition: A triple-hit bounded input pattern occurs during Class 2 clarification, or the user/caregiver confirms an emergency help candidate. The transition remains policy-driven and must not be triggered by LLM candidate text alone.
class2_transition_reference.prohibited_shortcut: LLM guidance or candidate prompt text must not independently trigger Class 0 emergency handling.

notes: Exact trigger semantics remain defined by the frozen policy table.
This scenario is intended for emergency override path validation and later class-wise latency profiling.
Class 0 emergency handling must not use the LLM as the primary decision path.
During Class 2 clarification, E002 can override the clarification wait only when the deterministic triple-hit pattern is observed or emergency help is confirmed.
doorbell_detected is not emergency evidence and does not authorize doorlock control.
